eligibility status (Medicare, Medicaid, Dual) and the state Medicaid identifier, if applicable. The file also contains the facility submission date for the data represented in the file record. The submission date represents the data submitted by the facility for the previous month.
The AHCAH file set is organized by release, and each release contains two files (a hospital and a patient file). Researchers should request files by release, as opposed to individual years or months.
